overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a spacesuit exploring a dimly lit industrial corridor with exposed brick walls and metal piping. The character walks down the hallway, pauses to examine a side locker area, and approaches a large reinforced door where another figure stands waiting.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the long industrial corridor, passing benches and wall-mounted fixtures

network of large metal pipes and conduits running along the ceiling
pendant lights suspended from the ceiling providing warm illumination
simple wooden seating against the right wall
wall-mounted cabinet with fire extinguisher and safety equipment

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a narrow industrial corridor with exposed brick walls and overhead pipes. Warm artificial lighting from hanging fixtures illuminates the metal grate floor and wooden benches lining the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor intersection with locker storage area

events.description: character reaches the end of the corridor and turns left to look into the locker area

agents.ego_description: pausing at the corridor intersection to look left toward a bank of metal lockers

entered.detail: tall gray metal lockers for equipment storage in the side alcove
doorway leading to a side room or storage area

segments.scene_description: Reaching the end of the corridor, the character turns left to examine a side alcove containing metal storage lockers. The large reinforced door at the end of the main corridor remains visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: airlock entrance with decorative wall mount

events.description: character turns back to face the large door and resumes walking forward
NPC character comes into view standing near the large entrance door

agents.ego_description: walking toward the large reinforced door at the end of the corridor where another character stands

notable_agents.action: standing near the large door, facing the entrance

entered.detail: massive metal airlock-style door with horizontal reinforcement bars
ornate creature or plant-like decoration mounted on the wall above the door

segments.scene_description: The character turns to face a large reinforced airlock door at the end of the corridor, walking toward it as an NPC comes into view standing near the entrance. A decorative wall mount hangs above the door, and the lighting remains warm and artificial.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit industrial corridor that leads from a narrow passageway toward a reinforced airlock. It begins by following a character in a spacesuit walking along exposed brick walls and overhead pipes, where warm artificial light reflects off a metal grate floor and wooden benches. As the character reaches the end of the hall, the camera pivots left to examine a side alcove filled with metal storage lockers while keeping the distant airlock door in view. The scene then shifts as the character turns back toward the main path, advancing toward the reinforced door and a decorative wall mount. Finally, the camera closes in on the entrance as another figure comes into view, standing waiting under the steady glow of the industrial lighting.
